sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84418" key="polemh/twr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολεμ-ήτωρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n84418.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">warlike,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antioch.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.111</biblScope></bibl>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:205" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.205</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
